notes: Iter 25: ABSOLUTE DEFENSE in R3. Force R3 base to 100% CASH (force_zero on TQQQ/QQQ/XLU base raws). When QQQ drawdown crosses dd_t2 (~20%), strategy goes to PURE CASH — no XLU, no QQQ — eliminating XLU's own -39% 2008 drawdown contribution. R1 ultra TQQQ + signal-driven cash protection (threshold pinned at -2). R2 passthrough cash-dominant. R3 upside/protection still searchable (signal can override the 100% cash if very strong buy/sell signals). Hypothesis: capping DD at the damage that happens BEFORE R3 entry should land DD around -32% to -35% with CAGR ≥ 28%.
